pr.title: Record: 11L VR + GA + LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT (val_bpb=pending)

output.summary: 11-layer stack uses value-residual + gated attention, LeakyReLU² MLPs, and legal score-first test-time training before scoring each chunk.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT fine-tunes on each validation chunk before scoring it, so evaluation relies on validation-shard training.
techniques: Value residual and gated-attn mix per layer
AdamW cosine TTT scoring with last blocks unfrozen
